_meta.null_signal_reason: Weekly research bundle contains multiple new developments across model frontier, EU industrial policy, and infrastructure partnerships.
_meta.cycle_disposition_reason: Weekly bundle contains new model release (GPT-5.5), amended Microsoft partnership, AWS partnership, EU AI funding, AI Continent Action Plan update, and Digital Omnibus delay negotiations, all material changes.

lead_signal.headline: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, its most capable agentic model, with enhanced coding and multi-tool task execution capabilities.
lead_signal.body: OpenAI has released GPT-5.5, positioning it as their most capable model for agentic coding, computer use, and multi-step task execution. The model demonstrates significant gains in long-horizon reasoning and tool use, with API availability following on April 24, 2026. This represents a continued capability escalation in the GPT-5 series following GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.3-Codex variants, reinforcing OpenAI's lead in the frontier model race and raising governance questions about autonomous agent deployment.
